title: Anne Thompson's Final Oscar Predictions in 24 Categories
text: Anne Thompson forecasts a competitive race between two frontrunners. She predicts One Battle After Another will win Best Picture with six total Oscars, including Director for Paul Thomas Anderson, while Sinners is positioned as a major spoiler. Thompson notes this represents one of the closest battles in recent memory and states the outcome could go either way. Best Actress: Jessie Buckley (Hamnet) is locked as the winner after sweeping precursor awards. Best Actor: Michael B. Jordan (Sinners) is predicted to win, having gained momentum after recent major awards victories. Best Director: Paul Thomas Anderson for One Battle After Another. Thompson observes that while Anderson's repeated nominations make him the likely winner, the chance to make history with the first Black director Oscar winner could prove irresistible for Ryan Coogler. Other major predictions include KPop Demon Hunters winning Best Animated Feature and Best Original Song (Golden), and Frankenstein taking multiple craft awards including Costume Design, Makeup, and Production Design.
